_evidence: DRB option daily-marks feasibility probe — Task-0 record for Phase 83 (daily option mark-to-market attribution). Encodes the SETTLED live probe; the executor builds against these as fixed facts and never re-derives them.
_subject: Phase 82 fixed the full-history TOTAL (BTC +6.479224 / USDC −97752.858490, <$1) but attributes each options_settlement_summary's (realized_pl + unrealized_pl) — a per-SESSION delta spanning MANY days — onto the ONE settlement day, so daily returns are insane (max |daily| 94%/day, Aug-2025 +3305% on strategy c225840c 'Phoenix Protocol' key 95089958). Fix: mark the open option book DAILY and SPREAD the MTM across the days it accrued. A REDISTRIBUTION that PRESERVES the total — closure gates stay green by construction.
_supersedes_attribution_of: docs/evidence/drb-options-semantics-2026-07.json (E1–E5 stay valid FACTS; their ATTRIBUTION consequences — coverage-gated −commission reclass, summary → daily rpl+upl — are superseded by this phase's daily-MTM model).

M1_mark_source_daily_chart.finding: Returns daily marks for OPTION instruments at ~100% coverage WITHIN each instrument's listed life, INCLUDING long-expired instruments (2.5+ year retention observed). One request per instrument suffices (a 1D series spans at most a few thousand points; no pagination).
M1_mark_source_daily_chart.bar_stamping: Bars are stamped 08:00 UTC = Deribit's settlement boundary — session-aligned with the options_settlement_summary rows.
M1_mark_source_daily_chart.consequence: The open option book can be marked per-day per-instrument at the 1D chart close, and the day-over-day book delta (ΔMTM) redistributes the session P&L across the days it accrued.

M2_rejected_alternatives.get_mark_price_history: REFUSES expired instruments — dead end for historical attribution.
M2_rejected_alternatives.note: Only get_tradingview_chart_data resolution=1D serves expired-instrument daily closes. Do NOT revisit the rejected candidates.

M3_position_source_signed_post_trade.finding: The signed post-trade `position` field on option trade/delivery rows reconstructs the per-day open book per instrument by pure replay — no fills-axis dependency, no hand-rolled Greeks/settlement math (D-08 stays in force).

semantics.delivery_zeroes: a delivery row's post-trade `position` is 0 when the position fully expires (encoded in fixtures, NOT asserted as a runtime rejection — a partial-delivery nonzero post-trade position is accepted as data, Deribit's call).
semantics.single_scope: key IS its own subaccount (drb03) — no cross-scope position mixing.

M3_position_source_signed_post_trade.guard: option trade/delivery row with absent/null/non-numeric `position` -> LedgerValuationError (schema drift — the field is the ONLY position source; fabricating a book mis-states MTM).

M4_day_grid_convention.finding: bar-tick UTC-day = native-grid day (PINNED §2 Q1). mark[instr][D] = close of the 1D bar whose tick timestamp falls on UTC day D (the bar stamped D 08:00), via the SAME tick->strftime('%Y-%m-%d') mapping fetch_deribit_perp_daily_index already pins. position[instr][D] = signed post-trade position after the LAST option row with utc_day <= D (end-of-day replay on the _row_utc_day grid).
M4_day_grid_convention.skew: The <=8h skew between a bar boundary (08:00) and native midnight is intraday attribution noise WITHIN the one-day class; the telescoped TOTAL is exact regardless (the skew cancels day-over-day).

M5_telescoping_total_preservation.identity: Sum_d native_pnl[c][d] = Sigma_change[c] + Book[c][last_marked_day], with Book[c][pre-inception] = 0 (full-history venue).
M5_telescoping_total_preservation.flat_terminal: Terminal-flat book -> Book(T)=0 -> total = Sigma_change EXACTLY (the Phoenix flat-terminal targets hold verbatim: BTC +6.479224, USDC −97752.858490).
M5_telescoping_total_preservation.non_flat_terminal: Open book at crawl -> total = Sigma_change + open-book MTM at the last settlement — the SAME settled-equity basis the native §5 gate anchors to (equity − combined_session_upl == cash + options_value − options_session_upl), so §5 closes by construction with the Phase-82 combined futures+options wedge (KEPT). NOT verifiable at Phoenix's flat terminal — first live open-book anchor is the watched follow-up.

M6_sparse_marks_fail_loud.finding: A missing bar inside an instrument's listed life essentially NEVER happens (probe evidence). A hole is therefore STRUCTURAL.
M6_sparse_marks_fail_loud.disposition: day inside [first_held, last_held] where the instrument's position is nonzero and its mark map has NO bar -> LedgerValuationError naming instrument + day (D-07). NO interpolation, NO session-lump fallback (that lump IS the bug being removed).
M6_sparse_marks_fail_loud.pre_retention_only_fallback: The only remaining cash-basis era is pre-retention/pre-listing (an instrument whose entire life predates the venue's ~2.5yr chart retention): a WHOLLY-EMPTY marks response whose last_held_day is older than the retention horizon -> that instrument contributes NO MTM; its days stay cash-basis `change` + the pre_summary_rollout_option_dailies warning (reused key). A wholly-empty response for an instrument INSIDE the retention horizon -> fail loud (structural).

M7_live_probe_2026_07_22._confirms: Independent re-probe (2026-07-22, Phase 131 reframe session) run from the Railway prod worker (whitelisted egress) — re-verifies M1 concretely and adds the Apr-2026 delivery-mechanics note. Encode, do NOT re-derive.

chart_data_expired_options.finding: The plan's assumed mark source is now independently confirmed: 1D chart data serves daily closes for long-expired option instruments at status=ok with dense per-day bars.

rejected_alternatives_reconfirmed.get_mark_price_history: [] / HTTP-400 for options (DVOL-constituents only) — dead end.

M7_live_probe_2026_07_22.position_semantics_reconfirmed: signed post-trade `position` — shorts negative, deliveries zero the position (verified live).

apr_2026_delivery_change.finding: As of Apr-2026 an ITM option settles PHYSICALLY into a future, and the future then delivers to cash — a two-step near expiry (two log rows). Final P&L is UNCHANGED; tolerate the two rows near expiry.
apr_2026_delivery_change.consequence: The replay must accept the option->future->cash two-step without a special case: the option delivery row zeroes the option position; the resulting future is a NON-OPTION classification and is IGNORED by replay_option_positions (its cash lands via the future's own delivery.change on the cash channel).

spike_collapse_regression.day_2025_07_14_spike: drops to |daily| < 10% (was part of the 94%/day insanity)
spike_collapse_regression.aug_2025_monthly: sane (no longer +3305%; plausible band for a ~$150k options book)
spike_collapse_regression.whole_era: |daily| < 10% across the ENTIRE covered era (max was 94%)

settled_do_not_reopen: 1D chart is the ONLY expired-instrument daily-mark source (M2 rejections are final)
signed post-trade `position` is the position source (no fills-axis, no Greeks)
bar-tick day = native UTC day (no new day-grid convention enters the codebase)
sparse mark inside listed life = fail loud, never interpolate
the redistribution PRESERVES the total (closure gates green by construction)

no option-expiry parser exists nor is needed — last_held_day caps the span (a position cannot outlive its expiry); the pre-retention discriminator compares last_held_day vs the retention horizon, not a parsed expiry (M1)
